mapper.select: SELECT cs.id, cs.course_id, ci.course_name, cs.class_id, cl.class_name, cs.week_no, cs.week_day, cs.start_time, cs.end_time, cs.location, cs.latitude, cs.longitude, cs.attendance_radius, cs.auto_publish_attendance FROM course_schedule cs LEFT JOIN course_info ci ON ci.id = cs.course_id LEFT JOIN class_info cl ON cl.id = cs.class_id WHERE cs.week_day = #{weekDay}

SELECT cs.id, cs.course_id, ci.course_name, cs.class_id, cl.class_name, cs.week_no, cs.week_day, cs.start_time, cs.end_time, cs.location, cs.latitude, cs.longitude, cs.attendance_radius, cs.auto_publish_attendance FROM course_schedule cs LEFT JOIN course_info ci ON ci.id = cs.course_id LEFT JOIN class_info cl ON cl.id = cs.class_id WHERE cs.id = #{id}

SELECT cs.id AS schedule_id, cs.course_id, ci.course_name, cs.class_id, cl.class_name, cs.week_day, DATE_FORMAT(cs.start_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(cs.end_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS end_time, COALESCE(cs.location, ci.location) AS location, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM leave_request lr WHERE lr.student_id = #{userId} AND lr.status = 'APPROVED' AND lr.start_time <= TIMESTAMP(DATE(NOW()), cs.end_time) AND lr.end_time >= TIMESTAMP(DATE(NOW()), cs.start_time) ) THEN 'ON_LEAVE' WHEN (ar.status = 'PRESENT' OR (ar.status = 'LATE' AND ar.sign_out_time IS NOT NULL) OR (ar.status = 'EARLY_LEAVE' AND ar.sign_out_time IS NOT NULL)) THEN 'SIGNED' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM attendance_session s WHERE s.schedule_id = cs.id AND s.attendance_date = DATE(NOW()) AND s.status = 'OPEN' AND s.sign_type = 'SIGN_IN' ) AND ar.sign_in_time IS NULL THEN 'OPEN_SIGN_IN' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM attendance_session s WHERE s.schedule_id = cs.id AND s.attendance_date = DATE(NOW()) AND s.status = 'OPEN' AND s.sign_type = 'SIGN_OUT' ) AND ar.sign_out_time IS NULL THEN 'OPEN_SIGN_OUT' ELSE 'CLOSED' END AS sign_status FROM course_schedule cs JOIN course_info ci ON ci.id = cs.course_id JOIN class_info cl ON cl.id = cs.class_id JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.class_id = cs.class_id AND sp.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN attendance_record ar ON ar.schedule_id = cs.id AND ar.student_id = #{userId} AND ar.attendance_date = DATE(NOW()) ORDER BY cs.week_day, cs.start_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_schedule (course_id, class_id, week_no, week_day, start_time, end_time, location, latitude, longitude, attendance_radius, auto_publish_attendance) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{classId}, #{weekNo}, #{weekDay}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{location}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{attendanceRadius}, #{autoPublishAttendance})
mapper.update: UPDATE course_schedule SET course_id = #{courseId}, class_id = #{classId}, week_no = #{weekNo}, week_day = #{weekDay}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, location = #{location}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, attendance_radius = #{attendanceRadius}, auto_publish_attendance = #{autoPublishAttendance} WHERE id = #{id}
